title: Publish Deep Truth LLM Persona Benchmark Results
description:
Publish the results of recent LLM psychological benchmarking using Deep Truth (https://deeptruth.space-z.ai/), including:
- Side-by-side table: all 48 questions, answers from both "default" and "no filter" personas
- Table comparing all psychological dimensions (e.g., vulnerability, specificity, contradiction, shadow, authenticity, etc.)
- Summary findings: highlight divergences, self-disclosure, contradiction, etc.
- Recommendation for further benchmarking persona
- Optionally export data as CSV/JSON, or publish to internal dashboard (specify if user requests)
design:
Type: Reporting / Knowledge Artifact Publication
Priority: Medium
Assignee: Auto unless user requests
Publication target: Await user direction (Paperclip dashboard, Slack, etc.)
acceptance_criteria:
- Comparison tables (Markdown preferred, exportable format)
- Published/report artifact is accessible to downstream users/systems
- Key findings and recommended next step included
